warnings: Dropped 2 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Late Arrival Penalty, Dress Code Penalty). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Demonstrates understanding of the event topic during presentation

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant showed no comprehension of the subject matter for the event, or they addressed the wrong topic.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant's grasp of the subject did not align with the specified event requirements.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant exhibited a clear comprehension of the subject during their presentation.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant showcased their understanding by employing specialized vocabulary relevant to the industry during their presentation.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No effort was made to examine the provided data.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The analysis offered was restricted and only scratched the surface of the data.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant presented an analysis of the data.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant delivered an in-depth analysis of the data, meeting industry benchmarks and discussing its wider worldwide implications.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No visual representations of the data were presented.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Only a single visualization was included, offering a basic, cursory look at the data.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Two visual aids were presented, attempting to clarify the patterns identified within the data.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor furnished a minimum of three original visualizations that effectively clarified the main patterns discovered in the data, relating them to the given topic.

criteria.name: Identifies recommendation to accomplish the purpose

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No suggestion for action was put forward.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: A suggestion was given, but a detailed strategy for its implementation was absent.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A sensible suggestion and a corresponding action plan were created.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: A practical suggestion and a well-formed plan were developed, along with the identification of required resources, supported by evidence.

criteria.name: Uses suitable and accurate statements related to the topic's information in presentation

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: More than three declarations contained factual errors.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two declarations contained factual errors.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: All declarations were factually correct.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All declarations were factually correct and supported by evidence.

criteria.name: Substantiates and cites sources used while conducting research

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No sources were referenced.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Sources or references were infrequently cited to back up claims.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Credible and professional sources or resources that support the claims are generally included.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Compelling proof from credible and professional sources or resources is provided to support the claims.

criteria.name: Statements are well-organized and clearly stated

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) did not appear ready.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant(s) were prepared, but the presentation lacked a logical progression.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation proceeded in a logical order.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation flowed in a logical sequence, and the points were clearly structured.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: None of the specified abilities were demonstrated.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two of the specified abilities (self-assurance, composed posture, engaging gaze, or clear vocal delivery) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three of the specified abilities (self-assurance, composed posture, engaging gaze, or clear vocal delivery) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All abilities were demonstrated, which enhanced the overall presentation.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant does not answer questions, or their answers are completely irrelevant to the topic.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant provides incomplete or unclear answers, indicating a limited grasp of the subject.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant responds accurately and clearly to most questions, showing an adequate understanding.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant answers confidently with clear, accurate, and insightful responses that improve the overall presentation.

criteria.name: Adherence to Competitive Events Guidelines
criteria.description: The execution of the presentation conformed to the guidelines. This includes using only permitted technology (adhering to size specifications, with a maximum of two devices and only one facing judges at any given time), aligning the presentation with the assigned topic, maintaining professional conduct during setup (no interaction with judges), ensuring no materials were left behind, displaying links or QR codes appropriately (not clicked or scanned by judges), presenting audio without external speakers (in the preliminary round), and avoiding the use of food or live animals.

levels.label: Competitor(s) Did Not Follow Guidelines
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) failed to adhere to the established rules.

levels.label: Execution Aligned with Guidelines
levels.descriptor: The execution of the presentation conformed to the guidelines. This includes using only permitted technology (adhering to size specifications, with a maximum of two devices and only one facing judges at any given time), aligning the presentation with the assigned topic, maintaining professional conduct during setup (no interaction with judges), ensuring no materials were left behind, displaying links or QR codes appropriately (not clicked or scanned by judges), presenting audio without external speakers (in the preliminary round), and avoiding the use of food or live animals.
